full_text:
Huan Sheng 桓勝
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huan Sheng (桓勝)was born in Linxiang county, Changsha commandery. Renowned in the south for his governance. Huan Sheng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Huan Sheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
